creator: 0mp@FreeBSD.org
text:
I try to set up an online account in Calendar Settings. The buttons for online accounts there are not triggering any action, however. On the other hand, I can set up and modify Calendars there.

Also, there are no error messages on stderr.

Details:
- FreeBSD 13.0-CURRENT r344508 amd64
- gnome-calendar-3.28.2
